meaning: adj.[宗]通晓神智学的,神智学的
examples: When I grew older and met with Bishop Leadbeater and the Theosophical Society, I began to see the Master K.
English colonels would stamp round india for years snorting with contempt and return home to join the theosophical society.
Helena petrovna blavatsky founder of the theosophical society was a huge bulwer-lytton fan and may have decided he was presenting true facts disguised as fiction.
